Lebanon’s President Joseph Aoun meets Rubio ahead of Trump talks

monitor_the_situation.title: Sirens Blare Across Kuwait Amid Iran Strikes
— S4 · Conflict · Kuwait · 9h ago. Air raid sirens sounded across Kuwait after Iranian missile and drone strikes, as US military claims retaliation.
US Strikes Targets Southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan, Iran
— S4 · Conflict · Ahvaz, Khuzestan, Iran · 17h ago. US airstrikes hit targets southeast of Ahvaz in Khuzestan Province, southwestern Iran, according to Tasnim News Agency, amid ongoing US-Iran war.
US Launches Airstrikes on Iran in Strait of Hormuz
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1d ago. US forces strike IRGC targets in the Strait of Hormuz, retaliating for a drone attack on a US base in Jordan that killed two American servicemembers.
